name: Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: @BarryShooshooga, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested
SIGMA Description: Detects write access requests to the Windows Defender exclusions registry keys. This could be an indication of an attacker trying to request a handle or access the object to write new exclusions in order to bypass security.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Rule Name" LIKE '%%%4417%' OR "Rule Name" LIKE '%%%4418%') AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Rule Name" LIKE '%%%4417%' OR "Rule Name" LIKE '%%%4418%') AND ("Event ID" IN('4656', '4663')) AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\microsoft\windows defender\exclusions\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Windows Defender Exclusion Reigstry Key - Write Access Requested
